sentence: 这个教区有两所学校。
pinyin: Zhège jiàoqū yǒu liǎng suǒ xuéxiào.
english: This parish has two schools.

meaning: 1. to slow; 2. to slow down (the pace of)
sentence: 他决定放缓脚步，好好休息。
pinyin: Tā juédìng fànghuǎn jiǎobù, hǎohǎo xiūxi.
english: He decided to slow down his pace and get some proper rest.

sentence: 王储今天出席了开幕典礼。
pinyin: Wángchǔ jīntiān chūxí le kāimù diǎnlǐ.
english: The crown prince attended the opening ceremony today.

meaning: 1. to inherit; 2. to follow; 3. to adopt
sentence: 她承袭了母亲的烹饪手艺。
pinyin: Tā chéngxí le mǔqīn de pēngrèn shǒuyì.
english: She inherited her mother's cooking skills.

sentence: 假若明天下雨，我们就取消野餐。
pinyin: Jiǎruò míngtiān xià yǔ, wǒmen jiù qǔxiāo yěcān.
english: If it rains tomorrow, we'll cancel the picnic.

sentence: 他有强迫性检查门锁的习惯。
pinyin: Tā yǒu qiǎngpòxìng jiǎnchá ménsǔo de xíguàn.
english: He has a compulsive habit of checking the door lock.

sentence: 她的手背被蚊子咬了一个包。
pinyin: Tā de shǒubèi bèi wénzi yǎo le yī gè bāo.
english: The back of her hand got a mosquito bite.

sentence: 气候变化让夏天越来越热。
pinyin: Qìhòu biànhuà ràng xiàtiān yuèláiyuè rè.
english: Climate change is making summers hotter and hotter.

sentence: 记者需要查证消息的真实性。
pinyin: Jìzhě xūyào cházhèng xiāoxi de zhēnshíxìng.
english: Journalists need to verify the authenticity of information.

sentence: 新开的咖啡馆就在商业区里。
pinyin: Xīn kāi de kāfēiguǎn jiù zài shāngyèqū lǐ.
english: The newly opened café is right in the business district.

meaning: 1. repertoire; 2. program; 3. song; 4. piece of music
sentence: 今晚音乐会的曲目已经公布了。
pinyin: Jīnwǎn yīnyuèhuì de qǔmù yǐjīng gōngbù le.
english: Tonight's concert program has already been announced.

sentence: 把果汁稀释一下再给孩子喝。
pinyin: Bǎ guǒzhī xīshì yīxià zài gěi háizi hē.
english: Dilute the juice a little before giving it to the child.

sentence: 街边那家商铺昨天关门了。
pinyin: Jiēbiān nà jiā shāngpù zuótiān guānmén le.
english: That shop on the street closed yesterday.

sentence: 两国学生参加了文化交流活动。
pinyin: Liǎng guó xuésheng cānjiā le wénhuà jiāoliú huódòng.
english: Students from both countries participated in a cultural exchange event.

sentence: 这家航空公司以低成本著称。
pinyin: Zhè jiā hángkōng gōngsī yǐ dīchéngběn zhùchēng.
english: This airline is known for its low costs.

sentence: 这个短语直译出来不太自然。
pinyin: Zhège duǎnyǔ zhíyì chūlái bù tài zìrán.
english: A literal translation of this phrase sounds unnatural.

sentence: 这部电影的译名起得很好听。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng de yìmíng qǐ de hěn hǎotīng.
english: The translated title of this movie sounds really nice.

sentence: 实验室里的试剂要妥善保存。
pinyin: Shíyànshì lǐ de shìjì yào tuǒshàn bǎocún.
english: Reagents in the lab must be stored properly.

sentence: 把杯子倒置放在架子上晾干。
pinyin: Bǎ bēizi dàozhì fàng zài jiàzi shàng liànggān.
english: Place the cups inverted on the rack to dry.

meaning: to study (in an academic program); to pursue (a degree)
sentence: 她正在修读计算机专业的硕士课程。
pinyin: Tā zhèng zài xiū dú jì suàn jī zhuān yè de shuò shì kè chéng.
english: She is currently pursuing a master's degree in computer science.

sentence: 他学了一年调酒，现在能做很多鸡尾酒。
pinyin: Tā xué le yī nián diào jiǔ, xiàn zài néng zuò hěn duō jī wěi jiǔ.
english: He studied bartending for a year and can now make many cocktails.

sentence: 十除以三，余数是一。
pinyin: Shí chú yǐ sān, yú shù shì yī.
english: Ten divided by three has a remainder of one.

meaning: to state explicitly in writing; to specify; to stipulate
sentence: 合同中载明了双方的权利和义务。
pinyin: Hé tong zhōng zài míng le shuāng fāng de quán lì hé yì wù.
english: The contract explicitly states the rights and obligations of both parties.

sentence: 这艘核潜艇可以在水下行驶数月。
pinyin: Zhè sōu hé qián tǐng kě yǐ zài shuǐ xià xíng shǐ shù yuè.
english: This nuclear submarine can operate underwater for several months.

sentence: 证人出庭指证了被告。
pinyin: Zhèng rén chū tíng zhǐ zhèng le bèi gào.
english: The witness appeared in court to testify against the defendant.

sentence: 电池的负极接到黑色的电线上。
pinyin: Diàn chí de fù jí jiē dào hēi sè de diàn xiàn shàng.
english: The negative pole of the battery connects to the black wire.

sentence: 公司决定增资扩大生产规模。
pinyin: Gōng sī jué dìng zēng zī kuò dà shēng chǎn guī mó.
english: The company decided to increase capital to expand its production scale.

meaning: corrupt official; grasping functionary; greedy mandarin
sentence: 那个贪官最终被判了十年有期徒刑。
pinyin: Nà gè tān guān zuì zhōng bèi pàn le shí nián yǒu qī tú xíng.
english: That corrupt official was ultimately sentenced to ten years in prison.

sentence: 越来越多的家庭开始使用再生能源。
pinyin: Yuè lái yuè duō de jiā tíng kāi shǐ shǐ yòng zài shēng néng yuán.
english: More and more households are starting to use renewable energy sources.

sentence: 这场表演赛吸引了很多观众。
pinyin: Zhè chǎng biǎo yǎn sài xī yǐn le hěn duō guān zhòng.
english: This exhibition match drew a large crowd.

meaning: white paper (e.g. containing proposals for new legislation); white boo
sentence: 政府发布了一份关于教育改革的白皮书。
pinyin: Zhèng fǔ fā bù le yī fèn guān yú jiào yù gǎi gé de bái pí shū.
english: The government released a white paper on education reform.

meaning: to reduce the pace (of movements, steps etc)
sentence: 下坡路滑，请放慢车速。
pinyin: Xià pō lù huá, qǐng fàng màn chē sù.
english: The downhill road is slippery — please slow down.

meaning: "legal quotient" (LQ), a measure of one's awareness and knowledge of t
sentence: 提高法商有助于我们更好地保护自身权益。
pinyin: Tí gāo fǎ shāng yǒu zhù yú wǒ men gèng hǎo de bǎo hù zì shēn quán yì.
english: Raising your legal quotient helps you better protect your own rights and interests.

sentence: 该书的发行人已签署了版权协议。
pinyin: Gāi shū de fā xíng rén yǐ qiān shǔ le bǎn quán xié yì.
english: The publisher of that book has already signed the copyright agreement.

sentence: 会议通过了这项决议案。
pinyin: Huì yì tōng guò le zhè xiàng jué yì àn.
english: The meeting passed this resolution.

sentence: 她偶尔还会想起自己的前男友。
pinyin: Tā ǒu ěr hái huì xiǎng qǐ zì jǐ de qián nán yǒu.
english: She occasionally still thinks about her ex-boyfriend.

sentence: 市里的文化宫每周末都有活动。
pinyin: Shì lǐ de wén huà gōng měi zhōu mò dōu yǒu huó dòng.
english: The city's cultural palace holds events every weekend.

meaning: still possesses; yet retains (some positive attribute that contrasts w
sentence: 这道菜做得不失水准，还挺好吃。
pinyin: Zhè dào cài zuò de bù shī shuǐ zhǔn, hái tǐng hǎo chī.
english: This dish still maintains its standard — it's actually quite tasty.

sentence: 学生们因为抗议校方政策而罢课一天。
pinyin: Xué sheng men yīn wèi kàng yì xiào fāng zhèng cè ér bà kè yī tiān.
english: The students boycotted classes for one day to protest the school's policy.

sentence: 骑士靴上的马刺在石板路上发出清脆的声音。
pinyin: Qí shì xuē shàng de mǎ cì zài shí bǎn lù shàng fā chū qīng cuì de shēng yīn.
english: The spurs on the knight's boots made a crisp sound on the flagstone road.

sentence: 她年轻时风华绝代，令人印象深刻。
pinyin: Tā nián qīng shí fēng huá jué dài, lìng rén yìn xiàng shēn kè.
english: When she was young, her magnificence was unmatched and left a deep impression on everyone.

sentence: 他每天写日记，藉以整理自己的思路。
pinyin: Tā měi tiān xiě rì jì, jiè yǐ zhěng lǐ zì jǐ de sī lù.
english: He writes in his diary every day as a way to organize his thoughts.

sentence: 此行收获颇丰，学到了很多东西。
pinyin: Cǐ xíng shōu huò pō fēng, xué dào le hěn duō dōng xi.
english: This trip was very rewarding — I learned a great deal.

sentence: 这个国家的总统大选每四年举行一次。
pinyin: Zhège guó jiā de zǒng tǒng dà xuǎn měi sì nián jǔ xíng yī cì.
english: This country holds a presidential election every four years.

meaning: amount of food one eats; portion size
sentence: 他最近饭量大了，可能是长身体了。
pinyin: Tā zuì jìn fàn liàng dà le, kě néng shì zhǎng shēn tǐ le.
english: He's been eating much more lately — he's probably going through a growth spurt.

sentence: 古时候人们用银两来买卖东西。
pinyin: Gǔ shí hòu rén men yòng yín liǎng lái mǎi mài dōng xi.
english: In ancient times, people used silver as currency to buy and sell goods.

meaning: land reform (abbr. for 土地改革[tu3 di4 gai3 ge2])
sentence: 土改之后，农民们终于有了自己的土地。
pinyin: Tǔ gǎi zhī hòu, nóng mín men zhōng yú yǒu le zì jǐ de tǔ dì.
english: After land reform, farmers finally had land of their own.

sentence: 央行宣布加息，贷款利率随之上升。
pinyin: Yāng háng xuān bù jiā xī, dài kuǎn lì lǜ suí zhī shàng shēng.
english: The central bank announced a rate hike, and loan interest rates rose accordingly.

sentence: 她暑期在图书馆做志愿者。
pinyin: Tā shǔqī zài túshūguǎn zuò zhìyuànzhě.
english: She volunteers at the library during the summer vacation.

sentence: 这台液晶电视画面很清晰。
pinyin: Zhè tái yèjīng diànshì huàmiàn hěn qīngxī.
english: The picture on this LCD TV is very clear.
